//: Optional MCP servers for BUILDING this platform. All entries are templates — fill env via your shell or a local untracked .env.mcp, never commit secrets. Remove any server you don't use.

postgres-dev.//: Read-only local dev Postgres so build subagents can inspect the live schema. Point at a throwaway dev DB, not prod.

github.//: Lets connector work and PR flows read repo metadata. Scope the token to the minimum needed.

agentic-kb.//: Once apps/mcp-server is running, point Claude Code at the platform's OWN MCP server to dogfood the Context Broker during development.
